results.title: Why Go To Hooters When You Can Walk Outside?
results.description: Hooters, the chain restaurant better known for its waitresses than its food, is attempting a family friendly rebrand. “There is a lot to clean up,” Hooters CEO Neil Kiefer told The New York Times (NYT) in a recent interview. Kiefer has worked for Hooters since the year of its founding, 1983, and became CEO in [...] The post Why Go To Hooters When You Can Walk Outside? appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Hogwarts Legacy 2: Reveal could be just around the corner
results.description: Current rumors suggest that Hogwarts Legacy 2 could be announced at the upcoming State of Play – possibly as early as early June. On Reddit, however, the claim remains controversial.

results.title: Martin St-Louis: 'I’d rather lose early than late'
results.description: Martin St-Louis spoke to the media after today's practice. First, it's worth noting that he confirmed Oliver Kapanen would be left out of tonight's lineup.

It’s been a good two months since he’s been this clear about anything.
